title: Set Up Integration Test Suite
description: Create integration tests that test service with real database.
steps: Create test database (Docker Compose with PostgreSQL)
Set up test fixtures: seed minimum required data
Create test helper: database setup/teardown between tests
Write tests that call service methods directly (not HTTP)
Run migrations before test suite starts
Add to CI pipeline: start test DB, run tests, stop DB
Keep tests fast: each test cleans up its own data
